system.requirement: Once you @Compendium[starforged-custom-oracles.starforgedcustommoves.Item.287bb4c2b53ea847]{Forge a Bond} (formidable or greater) to an elder mystic, and train with them…

abilities.description: When you @Compendium[starforged-custom-oracles.starforgedcustommoves.Item.a2d7793b23c17489]{Secure an Advantage} to ready yourself for a ritual, envision how you prepare. Then, add +1 and take +1 momentum on a hit.
When you perform a ritual, you may @Compendium[starforged-custom-oracles.starforgedcustommoves.Item.0fcfea7696d1de15]{Sacrifice Resources} (-1) and add +1 (decide before rolling).
When you tattoo the essence of a new ritual onto your skin, envision the mark you create. You may then purchase and upgrade that ritual asset for 1 fewer experience.
